hero.title: AI Product Owner
hero.subtitle: Making AI operational, measurable, and adopted.

useCases.title: Case Studies
useCases.subtitle: Concrete, measurable, and adopted AI solutions — from framing to production.

sirene.title: Sirene
sirene.challenge: Sales and operations teams waste valuable time identifying and qualifying companies through the standard INSEE Sirene interface. Rigid filter syntax and lack of semantic understanding hinder adoption.
sirene.solution: An AI assistant that understands natural language queries and interrogates the INSEE Sirene API to return structured, filtered, and enriched results — with no technical knowledge required from the user.

features.title: Natural Language Queries
features.description: Automatic translation of NL queries into Sirene API parameters via a finely calibrated language model.

features.title: Semantic Filters
features.description: Intelligent segmentation by NAF sector, region, company size and legal status from free-form expressions.

features.title: Enriched Export
features.description: Dashboard generation and CSV/JSON exports with enriched and normalized SIRET data.

comex.title: Comex
comex.description: Strategic framing and alignment through AI.
comex.challenge: Executive committees face a growing volume of AI initiatives without structured tooling to prioritize, frame, and align them with company strategic objectives in a controlled timeframe.
comex.solution: An AI-powered strategic deliverable generator, structuring Comex discussions around proven management frameworks (OKR, McKinsey 7S, Porter) to accelerate decision-making.

features.title: AI Roadmap Generation
features.description: Automatic creation of 12-18 month AI roadmaps, prioritized by business value and effort level.

features.title: Automatic OKR Alignment
features.description: Mapping of AI initiatives onto existing company OKRs with alignment scoring and conflict detection.

features.title: Sector Benchmarks
features.description: Instant positioning against industry AI practices via a database of analyzed case studies.

dvf.title: DVF
dvf.description: Real estate transaction search and analysis.
dvf.challenge: Analyzing DVF (Property Value Requests) data published by the DGFiP is tedious: multi-GB raw CSV format, no native visualization, and difficulty cross-referencing with geographic data.
dvf.solution: A real estate transaction search and analysis platform integrating interactive mapping, statistical zone analysis and AI insight generation from DGFiP open data.

features.title: Transaction Mapping
features.description: Interactive geographic visualization of all real estate transfers, with intelligent density clustering.

features.title: Price/m² Analysis by Zone
features.description: Automatic calculation of price medians by district, municipality and department with time-series trends.

features.title: AI Trend Detection
features.description: Identification of high price-movement zones and market anomalies via predictive analytics models.

fraud.title: Fraud Agent
fraud.description: Agentic fraud detection and recovery pipeline for property & casualty insurance.
fraud.challenge: Fraud teams at P&C insurers are overwhelmed by false positives from fixed rule-based alerts, while subrogation recovery claims against liable third parties are identified too late, or missed entirely, due to lack of time to cross-reference cases.
fraud.solution: A 5-stage agentic pipeline that scores each incoming claim, detects fraud networks through graph analysis, reads police reports using generative AI, and automatically triggers relevant recovery cases — a demo built on a fictional dataset, illustrating a multi-service agentic architecture on Azure.

features.title: Explainable Scoring
features.description: 0-100 fraud score per claim with Reason Codes, combining a Machine Learning model with business rules.

features.title: Network Detection
features.description: Graph-based analysis of cross-case links (repair shops, IP addresses, grouped filings) invisible in single-case review.

features.title: Automated Recovery
features.description: Police report reading via generative AI and automatic generation of the subrogation case file.

assurconseil.title: AssurConseil RAG
assurconseil.description: Multi-pattern RAG agent for insurance advisors.
assurconseil.challenge: Insurance advisors and claims managers must respond quickly and reliably to precise contract questions (coverage, deductibles, deadlines, exclusions) without ever hallucinating an amount or condition — a critical regulatory and commercial risk in the sector. A classic single-pass RAG fails on complex questions requiring multiple sources or reformulation.
assurconseil.solution: A RAG agent built on LangGraph combining multiple agentic patterns — complex question decomposition, a ReAct self-evaluation loop, and HyDE retrieval to limit hallucinations — with full traceability of each reasoning step, demonstrated on a fictional insurance document base (general conditions, coverage schedules, regulatory circular).

features.title: ReAct Self-Evaluation Loop
features.description: The agent searches, evaluates result relevance, reformulates its query if needed, until obtaining a reliable answer or honestly declaring the information unfindable.

features.title: Anti-Hallucination via HyDE
features.description: Generation of a hypothetical passage before vector retrieval to improve result relevance on ambiguous or poorly formulated questions, reducing the risk of invented answers.

features.title: Traceability and Governance
features.description: Each reasoning step (search, decision, cited source) is structured and visible in the interface — a key requirement for regulatory auditability in insurance.

verifid.title: ID Document Verifier
verifid.description: AI-powered document quality control and MRZ consistency check.
verifid.challenge: A subscription file with an illegible or incomplete ID gets stuck until a handler notices it and contacts the client — a back-and-forth cycle that degrades completion rates and burdens the back office.
verifid.solution: A demonstration that checks the quality of an identity document at upload time (legibility, completeness, framing) and verifies the mathematical consistency of its MRZ zone against ICAO 9303 — without ever judging its authenticity.

features.title: Instant quality control
features.description: Detection in seconds of blurry photos, glare, or partially out-of-frame documents, before a file ever reaches a handler.

features.title: Verifiable MRZ consistency
features.description: Deterministic calculation of ICAO 9303 check digits for ID cards and passports, with the calculation detail displayed — not a black box.

features.title: Front/back cross-check
features.description: Comparison of the document number between both sides of the card, as an additional consistency signal.
